subject: gdbstub: feature-aware register restore
description: Add target.xml fetch (qXfer:features:read:target.xml) + parse to gdbstub_client.hpp/qemu_handback.hpp. Use the parsed register-number map to send P packets for f0..f31 + listed CSRs (mstatus..satp + PMP + vector CSRs). Skip vector data regs (vlenb may be 0 in QEMU virt config). Add encode_p_body_bytes(reg_num, span<uint8_t>) for variable-width payloads. RED tests in gdbstub_client.test.cpp.
